caption: A news broadcast features a group of men, including Nitish Kumar, gathered outdoors amidst several microphones. Nitish Kumar, dressed in a dark jacket, is the central figure, surrounded by other men in winter attire, including scarves and jackets. They are speaking to a crowd of reporters, with various news microphones held up toward them. A red and yellow news banner at the top of the screen reads "नीतीश को तेजस्वी की 'सीधी धमकी'", while a large yellow "BREAKING NEWS" graphic appears across the bottom. Smaller text overlays identify figures like "डिजी CM", "सब्रत चौधरी", "विजय सिन्हा", "मंत्री", "विजेन्द्र यादव", and "श्रवण कुमार". The timestamp "10:03 PM" is visible in the bottom right. As the sequence progresses, the camera angle remains steady, but the "BREAKING NEWS" graphic shifts and changes shape, and some of the side text overlays are momentarily obscured or replaced by other labels.
